ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS "GRANTED". A HEARING ON THIS CASE STILL REMAINS AS SCHEDULED ON AUG-17-2012 AT 3:30 PM DEPT.#506. **(PER COURT ORDER (JUL-23-2012), COURT HEARINGS HAVE BEEN CONSOLIDATED (CSM-12-839931, CSM-12-839933, CSM-12-839934, CSM-12-839936) SO THAT ALL TRIAL HEARING CAN BE HEARD ON AUGUST 17, 2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT.506. THIS CASE CSM-12-839933 THEREFORE REMAINS AS SCHEDULED.)**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2012 - CONTINUED TO SEP-06-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PRESENT ON THE DAY OF THE TRIAL, SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION FOR HER ABSENCE AT TRIAL TODAY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

*****CORRECTED ORDER*****SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-21-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PRESENT ON THE DAY OF THE TRIAL, SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION FOR HER ABSENCE.*****CORRECTED ORDER*****
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROSHONG, AMANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,110.00, PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $500 IN THE JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (C) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
